fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: How is the value for the bit in the paging indication field determined? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: By paging occasion index

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What does the Rel. 16 feature of Subscription information allow? [3GPP Release 16]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: Indication of which S-NSSAIs are subject to Network Slice-Specific Authentication and Authorization

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the definition of OTA occupied bandwidth? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: The width of a frequency band such that, below the lower and above the upper frequency limits, the mean powers emitted are each equal to a specified percentage of the total mean transmitted power.

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the typical height at which the BSs are mounted in the indoor scenario? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: 2-3m

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the purpose of UE radio capability signalling optimization? [3GPP Release 16]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: To efficiently signal UE radio capability information

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What does the Location Service Request report provide? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: The result of a deferred Location Service Request

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What modulation schemes are supported for the PUCCH format 1? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: BPSK and QPSK.

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: Which mode is used for multi-TRP PDCCH transmission? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: Both 1 and 2

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the purpose of the Ndccf_DataManagement_Fetch service operation? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: To retrieve data or analytics from the DCCF

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: In which case is the HARQ-ACK message transmitted on PUCCH? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: When the PUCCH resource is overlapping with another PUCCH or PUSCH resource

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What does the NWDAF provide in the response or notification on 'QoS Sustainability'? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: QoS change statistics and Reporting Threshold(s)

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: When does a UE start and stop PDCCH monitoring according to search space sets with different group indexes? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 5: At the beginning of a slot after a PDCCH reception providing the DCI format with the PDCCH monitoring adaptation field

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is included in the final SIP response for tracking applications generating charging information? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: Address or identifier of the hosting AS and its application identifier

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: In online charging, how are chargeable events transformed into charging events? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: By the OCF

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What does the NAS protocol on N1 comprise of? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: NAS-MM and NAS-SM

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What does the eMBMS enhancements for LTE work item specify? [3GPP Release 14]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: Core and UE performance requirements for eMBMS enhancements for LTE

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the default treatment for positioning requests? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: Reject the positioning attempt

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the process of distributed/federated learning over the 5G system? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: The cloud server trains a global model by aggregating local models partially-trained by each end devices

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What does the feature 'Enhancements to LTE operation in unlicensed spectrum' enable? [3GPP Release 15]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: Efficient use of UL resources on unlicensed spectrum

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is supported for handover between gNB and ng-eNB? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: Xn and NG based inter-RAT handover

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What are the conditions for network determined user busy in IMS Multimedia Telephony? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 5: All of the above

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: Which work item introduces a new protocol value FAILURE_CAUSE for the SIP Reason header? [3GPP Release 14]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 5: SIP Reason header extension

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the responsibility of the network in the call control protocol? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: Activating integrity protection

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What actions can a UE take based on the recommended bitrate from the eNB? [3GPP Release 14]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 5: Initiate an end-to-end rate adaptation with the peer UE

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: When does a mobile station enter the GMM-DEREGISTERED state? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: When the MS is switched on

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is supported in enhanced TTI bundling compared to Rel-13 CE mode A in eMTC? [3GPP Release 14]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: Different repetition levels of scheduled PUSCH

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: Can the visited network offer additional services or access to content providers? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: Yes

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the purpose of the map-based hybrid channel model? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: To evaluate system performance using a digital map

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the requirement for network traffic patterns in service capabilities? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: To consider the discontinuous and asymmetric nature of most teleservices, multimedia services, and user applications

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What information is provided by the SMF to the UPF during the N4 Session Establishment procedure? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: Structured control information

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: Which interface is used for inter-eNB control plane signaling in Dual Connectivity? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: X2 interface

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the numerology based on for PSS, SSS, and PBCH? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: Exponentially scalable sub-carrier spacing

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the purpose of the Network Slice AS Group (NSAG)? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: To perform slice aware cell reselection and slice specific RACH configuration

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: Where is the PCI Optimization Function specified? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: TS 38.300

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What service does RRC expect from lower layers? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: Integrity protection, ciphering, and loss-less in-sequence delivery of information without duplication

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What are the enhancements for idle/inactive-mode UE power saving in NR? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: Paging enhancements to reduce UE reception power consumption

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is a mobile base station relay? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: A mobile base station acting as a relay between a UE and the 5G network

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is a multi-modal communication service? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: Service that allows input and output from multiple sources and destinations

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What are the abilities provided by subscription-related priority mechanisms? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: Invoking, modifying, and maintaining QoS Flows with priority

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What does the Operator controlled signal threshold per access technology specify for network selection? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: The signal quality required for a PLMN to be selected

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: In a shared UTRAN/GERAN network, what does the RAN node do when the UE is allowed to attach? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: The RAN node forwards the NAS message to the UE and cleans up any stored redirect data

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What are the pre-conditions for estimating the energy consumption of VNF/VNFCs? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: Knowledge of which NFVI nodes the VNF/VNFC instances run on

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the purpose of the N5CW device in the control plane for trusted WLAN access? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: To handle EAP-based access authentication procedure

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What are the data services included in MCData in Release 14? [3GPP Release 14]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: Both short message service and file transfer service

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the inter RAT mobility characteristic of handover from E-UTRA to NR? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 4: The source RAT configures Target RAT measurement and reporting

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What is the purpose of power headroom reports in MAC in gNB? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 3: To provide support for power-aware packet scheduling

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What does a RedCap UE expect if it monitors PDCCH according to Type1-PDCCH CSS set and does not monitor PDCCH according to Type2-PDCCH CSS set? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 2: The initial DL BWP to exclude SS/PBCH blocks and the CORESET with index 0

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: Which conditions must be satisfied for traffic steering from E-UTRAN to WLAN? [3GPP Release 17]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: RSRPmeas < ThreshServingOffloadWLAN, LowP and ChannelUtilizationWLAN < ThreshChUtilWLAN, Low

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What are the components of the Charging Trigger Function (CTF)? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: Accounting Metrics Collection and Accounting Data Forwarding

fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.question: What does the NAS-SM support in the control plane between the UE and the SMF? [3GPP Release 18]
fine-tuned (Phi-3) / Fine-tuning.reponse_attendue: option 1: Handling of Session Management between the UE and the SMF
